shortDescription: Backfill companyId on file_comments + file_audit_log — SPEC-255A completion
problem: After SPEC-255A deployed Firestore rules requiring companyId for tenant isolation on file_comments and file_audit_log, existing documents without companyId became invisible to users.
cause: Legacy documents were created before the tenant-isolation rules were deployed. No companyId field existed on those documents.
solution: Created standalone migration endpoint at /api/admin/backfill-file-companyid. GET = dry-run scan, POST = execute. Builds a Map<fileId, companyId> cache from files collection, then cursor-paginates file_comments and file_audit_log, backfilling companyId + _backfilledAt timestamp. Idempotent, orphan-safe, batch-limited to 450 docs.
testing: Pre-commit checks passed. Vercel deployment triggered. Endpoint ready for dry-run test via GET.
notes: 1 file, 413 lines. Follows exact patterns from migrate-company-id + fix-floorplan-companyid routes. super_admin only, withSensitiveRateLimit, audit logged.

commits.message: fix(security): backfill companyId on file_comments + file_audit_log — ADR-255 SPEC-255A completion
